name: Kevin Hayes
intro: A brief, compelling introduction about who you are and what you do. Mention your core philosophy, your passion for building digital products, and your drive for creating efficient, high-impact solutions.
introHtml:
As a software developer I focus on building practical, user-centered digital products. My work spans web applications, REST APIs, cloud infrastructure, automation, and front-end performance, with a strong focus on making software easier to use and easier to maintain.

I strive to understand the user, build with purpose, and keep solutions clean enough to scale. I’m driven by the challenge of turning complex problems into efficient, high-impact tools that create real value for people, helping them achieve their goals.
